content:
# Spoke CLI Design Decisions (2026-03-28)

## Resolved
1. No spoke cap. Docker handles resource limits naturally.
2. Dual-layer health: Docker container health (HEALTHCHECK pgrep claude) + corvia agent heartbeat. Dashboard shows both.
3. Auto-cleanup: spokes auto-destroy after PR merge. Entrypoint wraps claude, posts final status to corvia on exit, container exits. Hub prunes exited containers.
4. AGENTS.md propagation: mount workspace-level AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and .agents/skills/ into spokes read-only. Entrypoint copies into workspace root after clone. Repo-level AGENTS.md (build/test) comes with clone.
5. Spoke-to-spoke visibility via corvia MCP only (no Docker socket in spokes).
6. Spoke identity: unique CORVIA_AGENT_ID per spoke (e.g., spoke-42).
7. Git strategy: fresh shallow clone (not worktree, breaks in DinD).

Doc: docs/decisions/2026-03-28-spoke-cli-design.md
